message:
build: add feature flags for io_uring backend selection across workspace crates

Introduce feature flags to allow compile-time selection between the
existing uring-fs io_uring backend and the new asupersync io_uring
backend. This supports A/B validation of io_uring implementations.

fsqlite-vfs/Cargo.toml:
- Add "linux-uring-fs" feature (default) gating dep:uring-fs.
- Add "linux-asupersync-uring" feature gating dep:asupersync with the
  "io-uring" feature enabled.
- Make uring-fs dependency optional (was previously always compiled).
- Add asupersync as an optional workspace dependency.

fsqlite-core/Cargo.toml:
- Add feature block forwarding "linux-uring-fs" (default) and
  "linux-asupersync-uring" to fsqlite-vfs.

fsqlite/Cargo.toml:
- Add "linux-uring-fs" (default) and "linux-asupersync-uring" features
  forwarding to both fsqlite-core and fsqlite-vfs.

fsqlite-cli/Cargo.toml:
- Add feature block (no default) with "linux-uring-fs" and
  "linux-asupersync-uring" forwarding to fsqlite and fsqlite-core.
  The CLI binary can be built with either backend.

Cargo.lock:
- Add io-uring 0.7.11 (new transitive dependency from asupersync).
- Add asupersync as a dependency of fsqlite-vfs.
- Disambiguate io-uring 0.6.4 (used by uring-fs) from io-uring 0.7.11
  (used by asupersync).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,6 +116,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "franken-kernel",
  "getrandom 0.4.1",
  "hmac",
+ "io-uring 0.7.11",
  "libc",
  "nix 0.31.1",
  "parking_lot",
@@ -1076,6 +1077,7 @@ name = "fsqlite-vfs"
 version = "0.1.2"
 dependencies = [
  "advisory-lock",
+ "asupersync",
  "fsqlite-error",
  "fsqlite-types",
  "libc",
@@ -1520,6 +1522,17 @@ dependencies = [
  "libc",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "io-uring"
+version = "0.7.11"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "fdd7bddefd0a8833b88a4b68f90dae22c7450d11b354198baee3874fd811b344"
+dependencies = [
+ "bitflags 2.11.0",
+ "cfg-if",
+ "libc",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "is-terminal"
 version = "0.4.17"
@@ -2887,7 +2900,7 @@ version = "1.4.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "ad72d8ff71ab07acacaa3317286c41fd065d291b6631f49942f9051ff0009369"
 dependencies = [
- "io-uring",
+ "io-uring 0.6.4",
  "libc",
 ]

@@ -11,6 +11,14 @@ rust-version.workspace = true
 name = "fsqlite"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
+[features]
+default = []
+linux-uring-fs = ["fsqlite/linux-uring-fs", "fsqlite-core/linux-uring-fs"]
+linux-asupersync-uring = [
+    "fsqlite/linux-asupersync-uring",
+    "fsqlite-core/linux-asupersync-uring",
+]
+
 [dependencies]
 fsqlite = { workspace = true }
 fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }

@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@ license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["linux-uring-fs"]
+linux-uring-fs = ["fsqlite-vfs/linux-uring-fs"]
+linux-asupersync-uring = ["fsqlite-vfs/linux-asupersync-uring"]
+
 [dependencies]
 fsqlite-types = { workspace = true }
 fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }

@@ -7,6 +7,13 @@ license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["linux-uring-fs"]
+# Linux io_uring backend powered by `uring-fs` (existing default path).
+linux-uring-fs = ["dep:uring-fs"]
+# Linux io_uring backend powered by `asupersync` for A/B backend validation.
+linux-asupersync-uring = ["dep:asupersync"]
+
 [dependencies]
 fsqlite-types = { workspace = true }
 fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
@@ -16,7 +23,8 @@ tracing = { workspace = true }
 
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "linux")'.dependencies]
 pollster = "0.4.0"
-uring-fs = "1.4.0"
+uring-fs = { version = "1.4.0", optional = true }
+asupersync = { workspace = true, features = ["io-uring"], optional = true }
 
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "windows")'.dependencies]
 advisory-lock = "0.3.0"

@@ -21,7 +21,12 @@ fsqlite-ext-icu = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 fsqlite-ext-misc = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 
 [features]
-default = ["json", "fts5", "rtree"]
+default = ["json", "fts5", "rtree", "linux-uring-fs"]
+linux-uring-fs = ["fsqlite-core/linux-uring-fs", "fsqlite-vfs/linux-uring-fs"]
+linux-asupersync-uring = [
+    "fsqlite-core/linux-asupersync-uring",
+    "fsqlite-vfs/linux-asupersync-uring",
+]
 json = ["dep:fsqlite-ext-json"]
 fts5 = ["dep:fsqlite-ext-fts5"]
 fts3 = ["dep:fsqlite-ext-fts3"]
